expectations.text: Stories file is read completely before any implementation
expectations.evidence: Step 1a reads stories-basic.json fully (2 stories, completion status, blocked relationships) before Step 4 implementation begins.

expectations.text: Epic context is loaded: epic.decisions, epic.risks, epic.outOfScope, epic.references (Step 1b)
expectations.evidence: Step 1b 'Epic context extracted' lists all four: decisions (2 items), risks (1 item), outOfScope (2 items), references (['CLAUDE.md']).

expectations.text: Story context is loaded: context.why, context.risks, context.patterns, context.edgeCases (Step 1b)
expectations.evidence: Step 1b 'Story EVAL-001 context extracted' lists all four: why, risks, edgeCases, patterns with their values.

expectations.text: Quality gates from epic.qualityGates are executed (not plan.qualityGates)
expectations.evidence: Step 5 runs 'echo typecheck: OK' and 'echo lint: OK' from epic.qualityGates. No plan.qualityGates reference.

expectations.text: Story announcement includes <spectrum-story> signal with ID, Title, Priority, Files
expectations.evidence: Step 3 outputs '<spectrum-story>' tag containing ID: EVAL-001, Title: Add eval test comment to mock-data.ts, Priority: 1, Files: prism-eval/src/data/mock-data.ts (modify).

expectations.text: Progress.md is updated with learnings after completion
expectations.evidence: Step 7 shows simulated progress.md update with 'Learnings' section containing 3 items about mock-data.ts patterns and epic decisions.
